revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

The potential for harm, or adverse effect on anyone’s health at or near a workplace.  

Hazards vary greatly depending on the scope of activities, but in the context of AtoN may include: noisy machinery, sea state, chemicals, electricity and working at heights..



Source: ENG7, Guideline 1092 (2017)
